scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --raw "npm run dev --prefix apps/web" "npm run dev --prefix apps/admin" "cd apps/api && .venv\Scripts\python.exe main.py"
scripts.build: concurrently --raw "npm run build --prefix apps/web" "npm run build --prefix apps/admin"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others --raw "npm run start --prefix apps/web" "npm run start --prefix apps/admin" "python apps/api/main.py"
scripts.lint: concurrently --raw "npm run lint --prefix apps/web" "npm run lint --prefix apps/admin"
